steps.title: Let's build a survey!
steps.description: AhaSlides Surveys is a standalone form builder — no live session needed. Respondents fill it in at their own pace via a shared link. We'll build one together in under a minute. Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Open Surveys
steps.description: Click 'Surveys' in the left sidebar. The Surveys section is separate from your presentations — it's your dedicated survey builder.

steps.title: The Surveys dashboard
steps.description: Here you can see all your surveys with their response counts and status. Create new surveys with 'Start from an idea' (AI-generated), 'Start with a template', or 'Start from scratch'. Click Next to open a survey.

steps.title: Pages panel
steps.description: Inside the editor, the left panel shows your pages and questions. Surveys are organised into pages — click '+ Add page' to add more, and drag to reorder. Each page can hold multiple questions.

steps.title: Six question types
steps.description: Click '+ Add question' to open the type picker. Choose from Rating (stars, hearts, numbers), Multiple choice, Matrix, Long answer, Short answer, Date, or a Heading block for section labels.

steps.title: Question settings
steps.description: Selecting a question type opens its settings in the right panel. For a Rating question, set the number of icons (1–10) and choose a style: Star, Heart, Thumb, Smiley, or Number. You can also mark questions as required.

steps.title: Preview, publish, and share
steps.description: Click 'Preview' to see the respondent view across mobile and desktop. When everything looks good, hit 'Publish' — the status changes from Draft to Published and the Share button activates so you can copy the respondent link.
